bird.name: Flores scops owl
bird.summary: The Flores scops owl (Otus alfredi) is an owl endemic to the island of Flores, Indonesia. It is threatened by habitat loss.

relations.subject: Flores scops owl
relations.evidence: The Flores scops owl is endemic to the island of Flores, Indonesia, and inhabits montane forests from 1,000-1,400m
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Flores scops owl
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Flores scops owl
relations.evidence: Threats include annual and perennial non-timber crops, logging and wood harvesting, habitat shifting, roads and railroads, fire, and fire suppression
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
